### **1\. Page Structure & Content Placement**

* All Teacher Collective–specific content should live on the Teacher Collective page, not the Home page.  
* The Home page: [Flow in Faith Home Page](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1x41Fv-tiL-Jq2HSA8-JhJZP8RYwUqeGvLF_PYX0kvvY/edit?usp=drive_link) (I know we aren’t here in the timeline yet)  
* Make the font smaller so the first ¾ page you can see the full text   
* Different image. Use this [pic](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1CDTOX7BQ0_zUByQjobDIDeHwxu0tUnFO/view?usp=drive_link) instead

![][image1]

**2\. Language & Messaging Updates**

* Update phrasing everywhere from:  
  * “Christian yoga teachers of color” to “Christ-Centered Yoga Teachers of Color”

### **3\. Navigation & Buttons**

* Top navigation:  
  * Keep only “Join Now”  
  * Remove “Sign In” and “Learn More” from the header  
  * Make all the buttons gold

### **4\. Typography**

* Header text on desktop feels too large → reduce size slightly.  
* Avoid ALL CAPS (I know this was in the copy. Sorry about that).  
* Update font choice:  
  * Prefer a clean sans-serif font  
  * No decorative “tails”  
* CTA text can be larger, but still clean and readable.  
* Use same text throughout. This section seems to be a different font

![][image2]

![][image3]

Should say“Join Teacher Collective”?

![][image4]

Looks like sometimes the form is not loading. I will check on that. Can the form take up the whole space and not in a box?

### **5\. Color Feedback**

* Avoid overlay purple on purple background  
  ![][image5]  
* Premium Opportunities section: Replace gold/yellow box background with Purple transitioning into white instead.  
  ![][image6]

### **6\. Images vs Emojis**

* Remove emojis throughout.  
* Use images instead of emojis wherever possible.  
* There is an existing [image folder](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1NH8uSq_cY6Cd07mi9hGnNCFHwCCN99Nc?usp=drive_link):  
  * Let me know if additional images are needed

### **7\. Section-Specific Notes**

* Premium / Membership Options:  
  * Add the membership-options layout with pricing. [Example](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tSTRge1CkedzMsqHXQNI2YL80AOKQ6E3/view?usp=drive_link) 

### **8\. Images & Cropping**

* Adjust Queen bio image cropping so head \+ hair/buns are fully visible

###  **9\. Application \+ Checkout Page**

* All buttons should lead to Application  
  * Embed Code: \<div style="width:100%;height:500px;" data-fillout-id="e4pZwnuAkYus" data-fillout-embed-type="standard" data-fillout-inherit-parameters data-fillout-dynamic-resize\>\</div\>\<script src="https://server.fillout.com/embed/v1/"\>\</script\>  
* We have the option to redirect the applicants to a website once they complete the application. Can we create a checkout page?  
  * If yes, it will simply have this Header Image. The rest of the page will be the membership options aside the Cart  
    * **Embedded Cart:** \<div class="tc-v2-embeddable-target" data-thrivecart-account="sacredspacesyoga" data-thrivecart-tpl="v2" data-thrivecart-product="31" data-thrivecart-embeddable="tc-sacredspacesyoga-31-AAZHFZ"\>\</div\>\<script async src="//tinder.thrivecart.com/embed/v2/thrivecart.js" id="tc-sacredspacesyoga-31-AAZHFZ"\>\</script\>

Collective Enrollment Flow Chart

* Click on CTA button on website  
* Button takes you to Alignment Form  
* Complete Alignment Form  
* Sent to Checkout page with graphic of membership tiers and sales cart  
* Purchase Membership  
* Sent to page with Welcome video and form to “Create Account”  
* Added to appropriate list in Mailerlite and Email Automation begins
